ModMetaData.name: LBWO - Lesbianization BrainWashing Operation
ModMetaData.author: Puddle
ModMetaData.description:
LBWO…Lesbianization BrainWashing Operation
This is a surgery to spread the wonderfulness of lesbianism throughout the world in order to lesbianize the entire human race.
The brainwashing surgery adds "gay" to the traits of the patient.
Translations fork by Puddle origonal by Udon
